title: Sentier inventory sector metadata
description: Provenance file (metadata.json) carried by each data/<NN>-<sector>/ folder. Inventory is organized by sector / data type only; which upstream source supplied which rows is logged by sentier-importers, not recorded here.

sector.description: Lower-kebab sector / data-type id, e.g. agriculture, electricity, chemicals.

rank.description: Folder ordering / resolution precedence; lower wins.
